name: Web UI > Goals > Filters & Bulk actions > Assign Reporter > Model list of Report

rounds.implementation_report: Changed Goals bulk Reporter and Assignee actions to refresh the node-scoped reporter model before rendering the picker, so the deferred startup refresh can no longer produce an empty modal; reporter-load failures now show an action error instead of an empty list. Added focused regression coverage for successful hydration, HTML-safe reporter options, and load failure. Verification: node --test tests/web_goals_bulk_reporter.test.js: 2 passed, 0 failed; node --test tests/web_*.test.js: 33 passed, 0 failed; cargo fmt --all -- --check: passed; cargo check --all-targets: passed; node --check on both changed JavaScript files: passed; git diff --check: passed; live GET http://127.0.0.1:8082/api/reporters: HTTP success with reporter Buddy Williams.
rounds.prompt: Web UI > Goals > Filters & Bulk actions > Assign Reporter > Model list of Reporters is empty which is a bug.
